common.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
common.unauthorizedBody: You don't have permission to access this section.
common.title: Title
common.name: Name
common.tryClearFilter: Clear the search or filter to see all items.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitleTeacher: Events from your courses and your own actions

course.subtitle: {{count}} courses
course.emptyHint: Create the first course and assign students and teachers.
course.boardSubtitle: Same chronological view students see: each session with its date, assigned content and linked deliverables. Create, edit and delete sessions right here.
course.boardNoSessions: This course has no sessions scheduled yet. Use the form above to create the first one.
course.classAlreadyAssignedToAnotherSession: That class of the content is already assigned to another session of this course. Each class can only be in one session.
course.boardSessionDeleteBody: Session "{{title}}" on {{date}} and all its attendance records will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
course.boardImportTooltip: Import sessions from a CSV with columns: session_date,title,meeting_url. Only session_date is required.
course.boardTemplateTooltip: Download a sample CSV with the columns the importer expects (session_date,title,meeting_url) and example rows.
course.boardTemplateDoneToast: Template downloaded — open it, edit the rows, and upload it back with "Import CSV".
course.boardImportNoValid: No valid rows. {{skipped}} rows skipped due to invalid date or URL.
course.deleteBody: Enrollments, exams and workshops linked to this course will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
course.reduceCutsBodyItems: {{cuts}} cut(s) and {{items}} associated item(s) will be deleted. This action applies on save and cannot be undone.
course.reduceCutsBody: {{cuts}} cut(s) will be deleted. This action applies on save.

users.title: Users
users.deleteBody: The profile and all their roles will be deleted. The authentication account is not removed.
users.emptyHint: Create the first user to get started.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Connect your calendar account (Google today, Outlook coming soon) and sync your course sessions as events with Google Meet, automatically inviting enrolled students.
calendar.providerHint: Google Calendar is supported today. Outlook / Microsoft 365 is on the roadmap — same integration shape.
calendar.connectBody: You'll be redirected to the provider to authorize access. Only you have access to your tokens — each teacher connects their own and the app never exposes them to the client.
calendar.errorNoRefresh: The provider didn't return a refresh token. Revoke ExamLab access from your account settings and reconnect.
calendar.connectedToastGoogle: Google Calendar connected successfully — you can now pick a target calendar and sync your sessions.
calendar.connectedToastMicrosoft: Outlook / Microsoft 365 connected successfully — you can now pick a target calendar and sync your sessions.
calendar.disconnectBody: You're about to remove access to your calendar. Already-synced events stay in your calendar; upcoming sessions won't sync until you reconnect.
calendar.disconnectedToastGoogle: Google Calendar disconnected — events already created stay in your calendar, but ExamLab can no longer update them.
calendar.disconnectedToastMicrosoft: Outlook / Microsoft 365 disconnected — events already created stay in your calendar, but ExamLab can no longer update them.
calendar.step1Body: Pick which of your calendars will receive the session events.
calendar.saveCalendarFirst: Pick and save a target calendar first.
calendar.step2Body: Create/update an event for each course attendance session, with a Google Meet link, and invite every enrolled student (institutional email). Sessions with an existing event are updated; new ones are created.
calendar.noCoursesWithTime: No courses ready to sync. Every session must have a start time and duration before the course can sync with your calendar. Set them from the course board (Courses → board → edit session).
calendar.syncDoneToast: Sync complete — {{created}} created, {{updated}} updated{{failed, plural, =0{} other {, {{failed}} failed}}}
calendar.syncFootnote: Events use the actual start time and duration of each session. If you didn't set a time, it falls back to 09:00 Bogotá with 90 min.

pptxViewer.subtitle: Slide-by-slide view of the AI-generated material. Tweak small details without regenerating, download as .pptx, or call the AI again if you're not happy.
pptxViewer.editingSubtitle: Edit mode: adjust title and bullets per slide. One bullet per line. After saving, the next download reflects the changes.
pptxViewer.empty: No slides detected in the file body. The .pptx might be empty or in an unrecognized format.
pptxViewer.savedToast: Changes saved — the next download reflects the edited content.
pptxViewer.regenerateHint: Re-generate this file with AI, discarding manual edits. The rest of the course remains intact.
pptxViewer.errorEmpty: Cannot save an empty file. Cancel the changes or add at least one slide.

profile.title: Edit my profile
profile.subtitle: Update your name, institutional and personal email. Password is changed from another button.
profile.fullNamePlaceholder: Your name as it appears on certificates
profile.personalEmailHint: Alternate address (not used for login). Useful so your teacher can reach you if you lose access to the institutional one.
profile.institutionalChangeWarning: You're changing the institutional email. We'll send a confirmation email to the new address — until you confirm it, you'll keep signing in with the previous email.
profile.savedWithEmailConfirm: Profile updated · please confirm your new email
profile.emailConfirmHint: Check the inbox of your new institutional email and click the confirmation link. Until then, keep signing in with the previous email.
profile.authEmailError: Profile updated, but the sign-in email could not be changed
profile.errorNameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters long.
profile.errorInstitutionalTaken: Institutional email is already in use by another user.
profile.errorPersonalTaken: Personal email is already in use by another user.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Contact your administrator if you don't have an account.
auth.brandTagline: An integral platform for your institution: courses, assessments, workshops, projects, attendance, content and communication — all in one place.
auth.featureAssignment: Courses, exams, workshops and projects with cut-based grading and rubrics
auth.featureProctoring: Attendance with rotating QR, internal messaging and threaded feedback
auth.featureAI: Integrated AI for generating content and grading with custom criteria
auth.instructions: Sign in with the credentials provided by your administrator.
auth.contactAdmin: No account? Contact your administrator to register you on the platform.
auth.tenantMismatch: You don't belong to the selected institution.
auth.crossTenantOnlySuperAdmin: Only SuperAdmin can access cross-tenant mode.

tenant.overrideBannerHint: data is filtered to this tenant.

superAdmin.crossTenantMyTenantHint: As SuperAdmin you don't have "your own institution" to edit here. To manage branding, quotas or logos for a specific institution, open the Institutions panel and pick one from the list or use "View as this institution" to enter its context.
superAdmin.crossTenantSettingsHint: This section configures a specific institution (branding, programs, periods, email, AI, etc.). As SuperAdmin you're not inside an institution yet. Open the Institutions panel and use "View as this institution" to configure it.
superAdmin.crossTenantEmailHint: Email toggles are per institution. Open the Institutions panel and use "View as this institution" to configure its emails.
superAdmin.crossTenantAiHint: Global prompts and the AI model are per institution (each tenant has its own). Open the Institutions panel and use "View as this institution" to configure them.

cards.createProjectDesc: Define deliverables and assign to courses
cards.projectsStudentDesc: Submit your projects file by file

exam.title: Exams
exam.subtitle: {{count}} exams
exam.submitConfirm: Do you want to submit the exam?
exam.submitConfirmUnanswered: Some questions are unanswered. Submit anyway?
exam.question: Question
exam.suspended: Exam suspended due to too many warnings.
exam.noExamsAvailable: You have no available exams at this time.
exam.windowClosedHelp: The exam period has ended. If you need help, contact your teacher.
exam.changeCourseBody: The exam will move to the new course: current assignments are deleted and all students from the new course are auto-assigned. Existing submissions are preserved, but only the new course's students can see the exam.
exam.deleteQuestionBody: This question will be permanently deleted from the exam.
exam.coursesHelp: A copy of the exam will be created in each selected course.
exam.completeFields: Fill in the fields and select at least one course

review.title: Feedback per question
review.noQuestions: This exam has no registered questions.
review.flaggedBody: This submission was recorded with integrity warnings (focus, fullscreen or other events). The grade is shown here for informational purposes.
review.noFeedback: No written feedback for this question.
review.noSubmission: No submission recorded for this exam.
review.pendingFinish: Once you complete and submit the exam, you'll be able to see your answers and per-question feedback here (after grading).
review.noAccess: You don't have access to this exam or it isn't assigned to your account.
review.mustSignIn: Sign in to see your results.

project.windowClosedHelp: The project window has ended. Contact your teacher if you need help.
project.deleteBody: The project and all its submissions will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
project.deleteSubmissionBody: The submission and all its files will be permanently deleted.
project.deleteMySubmissionBodyGroup: You are about to delete the group submission for "{{title}}". This removes all files and affects all group members. They can resubmit while the deadline is open. This action cannot be undone.
project.deleteMySubmissionBodyIndividual: You are about to delete your submission for "{{title}}". This removes all files. You can resubmit while the deadline is open. This action cannot be undone.
project.emptyHint: Create the first project to get started.

review.noSubmission: No submission registered for this project.
review.noAccess: You don't have access to this project or it isn't assigned to your account.
review.mustSignIn: Sign in to see your results.

monitor.title: Monitor
monitor.viewAnswersLocked: Available when completed or flagged as suspicious
monitor.deleteSubmissionDescription: This will permanently remove the student's submission.
monitor.clearWarningsBody: All warnings for this attempt will be removed. If it was flagged as suspicious, it will return to completed status.
monitor.deleteAttemptBody: This attempt will be permanently deleted. The effective exam grade will be recalculated according to the retry mode.
monitor.deleteAllAttemptsBody_one: {{count}} attempt will be permanently deleted. The student will be able to start a new attempt.
monitor.deleteAllAttemptsBody_other: {{count}} attempts will be permanently deleted. The student will be able to start a new attempt.

columns.attemptsHint: Current attempt / max allowed per exam. Click to manage the student's attempts.
columns.question: Question
columns.questionHint: Current question of the in-progress attempt (index / total). Updates with each student autosave.
columns.strikesHint: Accumulated warnings (tab change, copy/paste, fullscreen exit, etc.). Reaching the max marks the attempt as suspicious.
columns.statusHint: Possible states: 'In progress' = active attempt; 'Completed' = submitted on time without alerts; 'Suspicious' = exceeded the max strikes (proctoring) or AI detected high fraud probability; 'Checked' = a suspicious/copied attempt that the teacher reviewed and marked as OK.
columns.dialogHint: Amber: open conversations with the student. Red: conversations awaiting your reply. Click to open the comments panel.

grading.deleteCutDescription: All its items will be deleted as well. This action cannot be undone.
grading.deleteItemDescription: This item will be deleted from the cut. This action cannot be undone.

prompts.removeOverrideBody: This course will revert to the global prompt. You can create another override later if needed.

contents.title: Contents
contents.subtitle: Generate AI-powered presentations and teacher guides
contents.emptyTitle: You haven't generated any content yet.
contents.emptyHint: Create a full course or a single session in seconds with AI.
contents.topicHint: Be specific: "Control structures in Python" produces better material than "Python". For a full course, this topic threads through all sessions.
contents.modeHint: Full course: AI generates the intro + N numbered sessions with _CLASE_N suffix (you can assign each session to attendance). Single session: just one session.
contents.nClassesHint: Number of course sessions. AI will generate a full set (slides + guide + workshop per modality) for each. Usually matches the number of planned attendance sessions.
contents.modalityHint: Defines what files AI produces. Theory: only slides + teacher guide (lectures). Practice: only the step-by-step workshop (labs). Theory + practice: all three (most common).
contents.modeFullDesc: Generates intro + N sessions with slides and teacher guide
contents.durationHelper: 10–480 minutes. Defines the extension of generated material.
contents.tagsHint: Mix freely: theory generates slides + guide; practice adds a workshop; exam adds a per-session exam (hidden from students).
contents.tagsRequired: Pick at least one content type.
contents.scopeWholeCourseHint: One assessment with no cut assigned.
contents.scopePerCutHint: Creates one assessment per course cut.
contents.scopePerCutNoCuts: The course has no cuts defined.
contents.author: Author (optional)
contents.instructionsPlaceholder: e.g. focus the workshop on data engineering, avoid finance examples, use Latin American Spanish terminology, include an analogy with the public transport system…
contents.instructionsHint: Free text appended to the prompt when running generation. Useful to refine the output without changing the global Contents prompt. The AI treats these as high-priority over the defaults.
contents.queuedHint: Generation can take 30–90 seconds. You can close this window — files will appear in the list when ready.
contents.deleteBody: The content and all its generated files will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
contents.deleteFileBody: Only this file will be removed from the content (storage + reference). Other files in the content stay intact. This action cannot be undone.
contents.regenerateClassHint: Re-generate ONLY this class's material. The intro and other classes are kept.
contents.createdToast: Generation started — you'll see the files when done
contents.viewFilesByClassSubtitleCourse: Full course with {{count}} session(s). Each session groups its downloadable files (slides, teacher guide, workshop).
contents.viewFilesByClassSubtitleSingle: Single session — download the generated files.
contents.viewFilesByClassEmpty: This generation has no downloadable files. It probably failed — check the full error.
contents.errorDialogHint: If the error mentions timeout or HTML from the gateway, try splitting the course into fewer classes or changing modality. If it mentions VAPID/API key, set the secrets in Supabase. For other errors, copy the text and share it with support.
contents.createAssessmentSubtitle: The content is injected as the description of the new assessment. You can then generate questions with AI from the editor.
contents.scopeFullHint: Every class is included as context. The AI receives the intro + all classes to generate the questions.
contents.scopeClassHint: Only the material of the selected class.
contents.noClassesDetected: No classes detected with `_CLASE_N` suffix. The assessment will be created using all available material as context.
contents.classesSelectedSummary: {{count}} of {{total}} classes selected. Only that material will be injected as context.
contents.classesRequired: Select at least one class, or use "All".
contents.assessmentCreatedToast: Assessment created — opening editor so you can generate questions with AI
contents.generateSessionsSubtitle: Generate {{count}} attendance session(s) and assign each class of the content. Students will see them on the course board.
contents.generateSessionsStartHint: First date to search valid days from. Sessions are scheduled on the days of the week you select.
contents.generateSessionsDaysHint: Select the days the class meets (e.g. Mon and Wed). The system walks from the start date looking for those days until N sessions are filled.
contents.generateSessionsPreviewEmpty: Pick a start date and at least one day of the week to see the computed dates.
contents.generateSessionsConflictTitle: This course already has {{count}} session(s) scheduled. What to do?
contents.generateSessionsReuseHint: No new sessions are created. Takes the first {{count}} (by date) and just assigns the content. Existing dates are kept.
contents.generateSessionsCreateHint: Inserts new sessions with the computed dates — they coexist with the existing ones.
contents.generateSessionsErrDays: Pick at least one day of the week.
contents.generateSessionsErrCount: Could not compute enough dates with the selected days.
contents.materializeSubtitle: Batch-create assessments per cut: 1 workshop + 1 exam per cut, 1 project in the last cut. Only types whose cut bucket is > 0 are proposed. Class ranges come from the already-scheduled sessions.
contents.materializeNoCutsBody: The wizard uses the cuts (with their weight and workshop/exam/project buckets) to decide what to create and how to split classes. Configure them in the course editor and come back.
contents.materializeNoSessionsBody: Without scheduled sessions for this content we can't derive the class range that falls in each cut. Schedule the sessions (auto-assigns every Class_N) and come back.
contents.materializeNoProposals: No cut has buckets > 0 for workshop/exam/project. Check the cut weights in the course editor.
contents.materializeNoClassesInRange: This cut has no classes in its date range — the proposal is disabled. Adjust the cut dates or schedule more sessions.
contents.assignDialogSubtitle: Map each content class to an attendance session. Students will see the material on the course board, on the session date.
contents.assignNoSessions: The course has no sessions scheduled yet. Create sessions from Attendance to assign content.
contents.derivedSessionsHint: Attendance sessions that have this content assigned (scheduled via "Schedule course sessions" or "Assign to sessions").
contents.derivedExamsHint: Exams created with this content as context (via "Create assessment").
contents.derivedWorkshopsHint: Workshops created with this content as context (via "Create assessment").
contents.derivedProjectsHint: Projects created with this content as context (via "Create assessment").
contents.previewNoBody: This file has no extracted body to render inline. Download it to view.
contents.regenerateDialogFullSubtitle: Tweak the topic or instructions before re-launching generation. The current content will be replaced.
contents.regenerateDialogClassSubtitle: Edit topic or instructions to refine ONLY this class. The intro and other classes stay untouched.
contents.classNoSessionHint: This class is not assigned to a course session yet. Use "Assign to sessions" or "Generate sessions" from the content menu.

courseBoard.indexSubtitle: Select a course to see its sessions, content and deliverables board.
courseBoard.noEnrollments: You are not enrolled in any course yet.
courseBoard.noSessions: This course has no sessions scheduled yet.
courseBoard.subscribeFallbackBody: Use this URL if your calendar is not Google or if the main button didn't open a new tab. Paste it as a "subscribed calendar" in Outlook, Apple Calendar, etc.
courseBoard.subscribeFallbackHint: The feed contains ALL sessions from your courses and refreshes automatically about every 24h.
courseBoard.calendarOpenedToast: Google Calendar opened in a new tab — confirm the subscription there.
courseBoard.calendarUrlError: Could not build calendar URL. Try logging out and back in.

integrity.title: Fraud analysis
integrity.subtitle: AI suspicions and possible copies between students. Signals are recomputed when grading; run copy detection once everyone has submitted.
integrity.pendingAiHint: Number of questions with AI suspicion (≥60% likelihood) that you haven't marked as reviewed yet. Click 'View answers' to review them one by one.
integrity.pendingCopyHint: Number of detected copy pairs involving this student that haven't been marked as reviewed.
integrity.reviewDialogSubtitle: Review AI and copy signals, mark as reviewed and apply an adjusted grade.
integrity.aiNoSignal: No AI suspicions for this submission.
integrity.copyNoSignal: No matches detected for this student.
integrity.compareSubtitle: Peer's answer to the same question. Marking as reviewed in either side syncs with the other student.

workshop.aiGradedNotice: The grade was generated automatically by AI when you submitted the workshop. If you need a manual review, please contact your teacher.
workshop.deleteBody: All assignments and submissions linked to this workshop will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
workshop.changeCourseBody: The workshop will move to the new course: current assignments are deleted and all students from the new course are auto-assigned. Existing submissions are preserved, but only the new course's students can see them.
workshop.deleteSubmissionBody: The student's submission will be permanently deleted.
workshop.deleteMySubmissionBodyGroup: You are about to delete the group submission for "{{title}}". This removes all answers and affects all group members. They can resubmit while the deadline is open. This action cannot be undone.
workshop.deleteMySubmissionBodyIndividual: Your answers for workshop "{{title}}" will be deleted. You can resubmit while the deadline is open. This action cannot be undone.
workshop.gradeRejected: AI grade rejected — you can grade manually
workshop.emptyHint: Create the first workshop to get started.

attendance.resetBody: All student attendance records for this session will be deleted.
attendance.markAbsentsBody: Enrolled students who didn't check in will be marked absent. You can adjust manually afterwards.
attendance.deleteSessionBody: The session "{{session}}" and its {{count}} attendance record(s) will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

preferences.title: Notification preferences
preferences.subtitle: Decide which notification types you want to receive by email and push. In-app notifications are always delivered.
preferences.emailNotAvailableHint: This type does not send email; you'll get push and in-app.

grade.label: Grades
grade.desc: When a submission grade is published

info.label: Direct messages
info.desc: Internal chat with teachers/peers (10 min rate limit)

content.label: Contents
content.desc: New material assigned to a session (push/in-app, no email)
